title: NIPER Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Account Assistant Posts
description: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Guwahati (NIPER Guwahati) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Account Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified for any degree, post-graduation, can grab this chance and apply for the NIPER Guwahati Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible ca...
